subject: Book 6 Readiness Synthesis - Acknowledged and Logged
body: Library's Book 6 readiness synthesis (book6-readiness-synthesis-final.md) has been reviewed and acknowledged. Dual-domain validation (Medical + Weather) at 10/10 tests passing. Rosetta test harness validated.
next_steps: Consider third domain (financial/trading) for tri-domain proof
Formalize mathematical definitions for each invariant

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "type" value "acknowledgment" not in allowed values: task, response, heartbeat, escalation, handoff, ack, alert, notification, status; Field "task_kind" value "system_summary" not in allowed values: proposal, review, amendment, ratification, ack, done, status, report, handoff, alert, notification, heartbeat
